title: Invoice
description: An Invoice represents a sales form where the customer pays for a product or service later. It creates an accounts receivable transaction.

Id.description: Unique identifier for the invoice (assigned by QuickBooks)

SyncToken.description: Version number of the entity, used for optimistic locking. Required for updates.

DocNumber.description: Reference number for the transaction. If not provided, QuickBooks auto-generates one.

TxnDate.description: The date of the transaction. Defaults to the current date.

DueDate.description: Date when the payment of the transaction is due

PrivateNote.description: A private note that is not displayed to the customer

CustomerMemo.description: A note to the customer displayed on the invoice

Line.description: Individual line items of the transaction. At least one line is required.

TotalAmt.description: Total amount of the transaction including tax

Balance.description: The balance remaining on the invoice. A value of 0 indicates the invoice is fully paid.

Deposit.description: Deposit amount applied to the invoice

ShipDate.description: Date for delivery of goods or services

ApplyTaxAfterDiscount.description: Whether to apply tax after discount

EmailStatus.description: Email delivery status of the invoice

GlobalTaxCalculation.description: Method in which tax is applied

AllowOnlineCreditCardPayment.description: Whether online credit card payment is allowed

AllowOnlineACHPayment.description: Whether online ACH (bank) payment is allowed

sparse.description: Whether this is a sparse (partial) representation
